change.purpose: Run the audio observability, audibility outcome, deployment identity, and Vercel build identity contracts against immutable source, then build and assert that the resulting bundle contains the exact Git commit.

verification.claim: workflow source committed; runtime execution not yet observed

boundaries: No payment or conversion logic was added to Vercel.
No files or Git history were deleted.
No audible iPhone result is claimed without device evidence.
No successful deployment is claimed while Vercel reports a rate-limit failure.
next_action: Observe or dispatch the GitHub Actions workflow, inspect job and artifact evidence, then obtain a successful Vercel deployment and pair its immutable commit identity with an iPhone audibility outcome.
